suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that `.factory/services.yaml` is resolved relative to the repo root/working tree, not the mission home directory, so validators and reviewers do not attempt nonexistent absolute paths outside the repository.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The original phase-5 review logged an ENOENT for `/home/lenstr/.factory/services.yaml`, while the repo stores the manifest at `/home/lenstr/workspace/personal/hack/rgo-lang/.factory/services.yaml`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Either provide the `mission-worker-base` skill in the installed skill set or remove references to it from worker procedures so transcripts do not rely on a missing reusable workflow.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix review observed session `38b22a54-3f52-4fa1-8a5b-f76ad180d7e0` invoking `mission-worker-base`, but the available skills on disk did not include that skill.
